meaning: n.梨的一种,香柠檬,香柠檬油
examples: They could always buy synthetic bergamot, for about a third of the price.
Indeed, the provincial capital, Reggio Calabria, proudly calls itself the Bergamot City.
Though their variety seems endless, one thing that many of these gifts have in common is that they contain bergamot oil.
Golden Osetra caviar perfected Big Eye Tuna atop fresh bergamot and a froth of green apple.
Its black leaves are suffused with caramel, vanilla and an enigmatic citrus note, bergamot.
